title: Plan Mode & Extended Thinking for Claude Code
detailMarkdown:
# Plan Mode & Extended Thinking for Claude Code
Activate Claude's extended thinking mode with multi-level planning depth from 'think' to 'ultrathink' for comprehensive strategy creation before implementation
**Category:** commands
**Author:** JSONbored
**Tags:** `plan-mode` `extended-thinking` `strategy` `architecture` `deep-reasoning` `ultrathink`

## Install
```bash
/plan-mode [task] [depth]
```

## Usage
/plan-mode [task] [depth]

- https://heyclau.de/commands/plan-mode
- https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/extended-thinking
